seed_instruction: Evaluate the storyline of the Harry Potter series.
org_constraint: The response must contain at least nine sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain at most eight sentences.
instruction: Evaluate the storyline of the Harry Potter series. The response must contain at least nine sentences. The response must contain at most eight sentences.
response: It is impossible to fulfill your request because the constraints you provided are logically contradictory. You asked for a response to contain at least nine sentences while simultaneously demanding that it contain at most eight sentences. No single text can satisfy both conditions of having a minimum of nine items and a maximum of eight items at the same time. Therefore, I cannot generate a story evaluation that meets these specific numerical requirements. If you would like an evaluation with a different sentence count, such as exactly ten or exactly five, I would be happy to provide that instead. Please let me know how you would like to adjust your constraints so I can assist you further.
